site_updates.name: site_updates
saved_ids: 11/13/2025added a page that ranks the [word counts](https://nomnomnami.com/games/stats.html) for all my visual novels, i might add other stats to it later

11/18/2025new [guestbook](https://nomnomnami.atabook.org/) hosted through atabook since the old one broke! made an [archived version](https://nomnomnami.com/guestbook/archive.html) so the previous entries weren't lost.
11/21/2025homepage update! added cute banners to help the page be less text-heavy. so much going on in this website.......

11/23/2025new page! [the namiverse](https://nomnomnami.com/namiverse.html) is home to the official timeline for treat's world, and explains the connections between all my games... still a bit under construction tho.
12/2/2025[night with timber doodle comics](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/nwt/) gallery is LIVE!!! pretty happy with these pages so i will be updating my older galleries to match this month~

12/3/2025[treat](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/treat/) and [syrup](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/syrup/) doodle comic galleries are up!!! there are some new ones i'd never posted before in there, so enjoy looking~
12/6/2025FINALLY finished redoing my [doodle comics gallery](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/doodles.html)!!! my [autobio comics](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/autobio/) were the last set, yaaay
12/8/2025i have just completed construction of... a [character gallery](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/) for all my ocs!!!!!!!! i'll be adding pages to it slowly cuz they take a while to make.

12/12/2025new [site template](https://nomnomnami.com/templates/)! now you can make a fake wiki for your OCs too!!! live preview [here](https://nomnomnami.com/templates/thyme/). i also updated my [404 page](https://nomnomnami.com/not_found.html) to be htwml themed!

12/16/2025archive for [the foxy catch](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/foxycatch/) is live! updated the [moxdonald's](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/moxdonalds/) pages a bit too (mostly to be like hey there's a sequel lol)
12/20/2025updated [the foxy catch archive](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/foxycatch/) with the second half of the event!

12/22/2025[the foxy catch epilogue comic](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/foxycatch/extra02.html) is up, plus [chai's page](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/chai.html) in the character gallery! (i haven't been listing all of those in the site updates sorry)

1/1/2026added a [disgaea fan comics](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/disgaea/) gallery (full of old art from like 10 years ago), also updated my [news archive](https://nomnomnami.com/news/) up through november 2025

1/10/2026starting fresh on my [posts page](https://nomnomnami.com/posts/), archive for previous years is [here](https://nomnomnami.com/posts/archive/). small edits to my [FAQ](https://nomnomnami.com/faq.html) since someone pointed out a dead link.
1/12/2026added a new [downloads](https://nomnomnami.com/downloads/) page, gonna start making all sorts of things available on there... slowly

1/13/2026[art collections](https://nomnomnami.com/downloads/art-collections/) page is up, got rid of the temp treat downloads directory so all links should be fixed now... easier to find things from the single page i think
1/13/2026wait second massive update today, my [art gallery](https://nomnomnami.com/art/) is finally way more presentable?!?!?? still moving things around, but... it's looking gooooood!!!!!
1/17/2026new [contact form](https://nomnomnami.com/contact.html) just dropped... this one has FILE ATTACHMENTS!!! what an upgrade!!!!!

1/30/2026[fanart gallery](https://nomnomnami.com/art/fanart/) is live!!! still missing some sections tho... oh well. also updated my [projects page](https://nomnomnami.com/projects.html), it's a little better as a status tracker now!
2/3/2026finally fixed the comments on my [posts](https://nomnomnami.com/posts/) page

2/8/2026filled out the summaries for astra's garden and contract demon on the [namiverse](https://nomnomnami.com/namiverse.html) page, and added [syrup](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/syrup.html) and [gumdrop](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/gumdrop.html) to the character gallery (haven't written their comment sections yet though... i was just sick of their pages not being up yet haha)
3/26/2026updated [game releases](https://nomnomnami.com/games/) and [character gallery](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/) since escape from wormwood came out!

3/26/2026updated [game releases](https://nomnomnami.com/games/) and [character gallery](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/) since escape from wormwood came out! updated [namiverse](https://nomnomnami.com/namiverse.html) page too (i realized TCS was missing on there lol)
4/8/2026still updating [character pages](https://nomnomnami.com/characters/), added webcomic banners to my front page since i'm not writing each update in my newsfeed anymore
4/10/2026new [NWT doodle comic](https://nomnomnami.com/comics/nwt/) (from last month, but i will be posting an actual new one tomorrow too)

4/19/2026updated my [links](https://nomnomnami.com/links/) page, i saw someone do tables for theirs and it's so much more readable than my old list lol. put the neighbors at the top and removed my web dev links because they're going in another section of the site that is still WIP (i had already moved them out of the html expecting to make it live sooner, oh well)
4/20/2026added a [fonts page](https://nomnomnami.com/downloads/fonts) where u can download all the fonts i've made (there's 3 of them)
5/8/2026redid my sidebar and changed the theme swapper to dark mode. sitemap update coming soon (i'm tired so i'm not sure it will be tonight)

5/19/2026i've been posting so much [tomodachi life](https://nomnomnami.com/posts/tomodachi-life/) stuff, please look at it. OH omg i updated my [projects](https://nomnomnami.com/projects.html) page, some of the info was outdated there sorry.
5/20/2026[custom cursors](https://nomnomnami.com/downloads/cursors/) update: finished treat cursor and added linux downloads! (sorry i have not made more yet)
5/28/2026redid the layout on my [guide to the namiverse](https://nomnomnami.com/namiverse.html) page so it's way less overwhelming and hopefully more useful!
